name: HTTP Request
description: Adds HTTP GET and POST blocks for web requests

blocks.name: HTTP GET
blocks.exportCode: `(function() { const url = ${b.getValue('url')}; let headersObj = {}; try { headersObj = ${b.getValue('headers')}; } catch(e) { console.error('Invalid headers:', e); } fetch(url, { headers: headersObj }).then(r => r.json()).then(data => { window['${b.getValue('target')}'] = data; }).catch(e => console.error('HTTP GET failed:', e)); })();`

blocks.name: HTTP POST
blocks.exportCode: `(function() { const url = ${b.getValue('url')}; let headersObj = {}; let bodyObj = ${b.getValue('body')}; try { headersObj = ${b.getValue('headers')}; } catch(e) { console.error('Invalid headers:', e); } fetch(url, { method: 'POST', headers: headersObj, body: JSON.stringify(bodyObj) }).then(r => r.json()).then(data => { window['${b.getValue('target')}'] = data; }).catch(e => console.error('HTTP POST failed:', e)); })();`
